title: Jamaican Fried Egg
description: A simple breakfast recipe using a fried egg with a Jamaican twist
instructions: Crack the egg into a bowl and whisk it together with the egg yolk.
Add the Jamaican Jerk Seasoning and mix well.
Heat the cooking oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Pour in the egg mixture and cook until the edges start to set.
Use a spatula to gently stir the egg mixture in a circular motion.
Continue cooking until the eggs are cooked through.
Serve hot with a dollop of sour cream on top.
